title: Universal Item Tags
description: Automatically adds tags to items that meet certain conditions.
body:
Automatically detects items that meet various conditions and adds tags to them, including ones added by mods. 

Made primarily for use with other mods sorting systems, such as the Mekanism logistical sorters but may also be useful for pack devs adding recipes.

 

All tags can be disabled in the config file, or have items blacklisted and whitelisted from them.

 

This mod is server side only and does not need to be installed on clients unless as part of a modpack.

 

#### Included Tags:

forge:blocks - all items that place blocks.

forge:brewing_ingredients - items that can be used as an input in a brewing recipe.

forge:damageable - items with durability.

forge:foods - anything that can be eaten.

forge:furnace_fuels - anything that can be used as furnace fuels.

forge:potions - all potion types.

forge:redstone_components - blocks that interact with redstone signals.

forge:unstackable - items with a stack size of 1.
